NAVAREA XIX 3/14
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 131830UTC JAN 14.
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
    72-35.35N 020-13.96E WEST HERCULES 
    72-06.23N 022 36 48E TRANSOCEAN BARENTS    
    66-14,47N 008-19,58E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN           
    65-02.26N 006-56.27E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I
       WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 120/13
